root.rep_text: รายงานการเปลี่ยนแปลงการส่งหุ้นรายเดือน

operate_date.text: วันที่คำขอ

member_group_no.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

approve_status.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือก

root.sql: select tab.* ,sum(tab.row_memno)over (partition by (member_group_control)order by tab.member_group_control, tab.member_group_no,tab.membership_no) as rowno from ( select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control||' '||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as group_control_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) ||' ' ||member_name ||' ' ||member_surname as member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no || ' - ' || (select member_group_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) as group_name, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new, (CASE sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status_last WHEN '0' THEN 'ส่งเพิ่มขึ้น' ELSE (CASE sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status_last WHEN '1' THEN 'งดส่ง' WHEN '2' THEN 'ส่งปกติ' END) END) as status_old, (CASE sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status WHEN '1' THEN 'งดส่ง' WHEN '0' THEN '-' ELSE (CASE sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status WHEN '2' THEN 'ส่งปกติ' END) END) as status_new, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old , sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.effactive_date ,(CASE lag(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,1,null)over(order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) WHEN sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.remark from sc_mem_m_chg_share_det , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_chang_request, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no = sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.cancel_status = '0' ) and ( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new != sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old ) /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between to_date('2018-1-1 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and to_date('2018-9-12 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') -- and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '010000' and '010000' order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) tab
